channel.title: Automotive on Roald Nefs
channel.description: Recent content in Automotive on Roald Nefs

item.title: Building a Car Hacking Test Bench
item.author: info@roaldnefs.com (Roald Nefs)
item.description: Modern cars are computers on wheel, dozens of ECUs, multiple busses, wireless interfaces, and a threat model that keeps expanding. For the past few years I dipped my toes in the automotive security scene. It’s now time to take a deep dive. So I bought a car.
